landing.tagline: Democratizing Excellence for Every Cameroonian Student.
landing.heroSubtitle: Your journey to the prestigious Grandes Écoles starts here with expert-led training and AI-driven insights.
landing.featureMicroBody: Master complex concepts in 5-minute focused bursts designed for busy schedules.
landing.featureExamBody: Simulate real Grande École entrance conditions every weekend and track your ranking.
landing.featureAiBody: Personalized feedback loops that identify your weak spots before they become hurdles.
landing.testimonial1Quote: "Lefax didn't just give me materials; it gave me a strategy. The mock exams were identical to the real competition pressure."
landing.testimonial2Quote: "The micro-learning modules helped me stay consistent even while working part-time. I owe my admission to the precision of Lefax."
landing.ctaBody: Join over 10,000 students preparing for a brighter future today.
landing.footerTagline: Building the next generation of African excellence, one lesson at a time.

errors.OTP_EXPIRED: This code has expired, request a new one.

errors.INTERNAL: Something went wrong. Please try again.

intro.body: Answer a few questions to identify your strengths and weak spots. We'll adapt your upcoming lessons based on the results.
intro.noPressureBody: This isn't an exam. Your score isn't shared. It's only used to adapt the difficulty of your upcoming lessons.

about.title: About Lefax Course
about.mission: Lefax Course was born from a simple conviction: every Cameroonian student deserves elite preparation for Grandes Écoles entrance exams, wherever they are. We combine cutting-edge pedagogical expertise with artificial intelligence tools to deliver a personalized, effective, and accessible learning experience for all.

access.title: Accessibility
access.body: Excellence should not depend on geography or income. Our platform is designed to work even with limited connectivity.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.body: Every lesson, every MCQ, every mock exam is designed by expert teachers and validated by successful alumni.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.body: Our AI tutor and adaptation algorithms transform how students identify and fill their knowledge gaps.

community.title: Community
community.body: We believe in the power of collective effort. Rankings, testimonials, and the referral system create a healthy competitive spirit.

about.story: Founded in 2024 by a team of former Grandes Écoles students, Lefax Course was born from the observation that the best students all had access to similar resources: study cards, mock exams, and mentorship. Our mission is to democratize this access for every deserving student in Cameroon.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: A question, suggestion, or partnership? We're here to help.

dataCollection.title: 1. Data We Collect
dataCollection.body: We collect the data necessary for platform operation: name, phone number, email address (for teachers and administrators), school affiliation, and learning data (scores, progress, AI tutor interactions).

dataUse.title: 2. How We Use Data
dataUse.body: Your data is used to: personalize your learning experience, calculate your mastery scores and ranking, improve the quality of our educational content, and send important notifications related to your account.

dataSharing.title: 3. Data Sharing
dataSharing.body: We never sell your personal data. Your data may be shared with: your school (aggregated results only), our technical providers (hosting, SMS delivery) under strict confidentiality agreements, and authorities when legally required.

security.title: 4. Security
security.body: We use SSL/TLS encryption for all communications, secure storage via Supabase (PostgreSQL with RLS), and JWT authentication with httpOnly refresh tokens. Your passwords are never stored in plain text.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.body: We use only cookies strictly necessary for session operation (JWT refresh token in httpOnly cookie). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.body: Under Cameroonian data protection legislation, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data. Contact us at contact@lefaxcourse.com to exercise these rights.

changes.title: 7. Changes
changes.body: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy. Any significant changes will be notified to you by email or via the application.
